reasons: Lolita can protect Irithel from projectile pressure while Irithel keeps moving and attacking.
Irithel benefits from a frontline protector who can block poke and peel enemy dive.

proof.summary: Irithel needs safe spacing, while Lolita creates a defensive zone that helps her keep attacking from the backline.
worksBestWhen: Lolita stays between Irithel and enemy poke.
Irithel positions behind Lolita instead of standing alone.
failureCases: Lolita uses protection before the real engage.
Irithel is caught outside Lolita's zone.

reasons: Tigreal can group and control enemies so Irithel can attack from safer distance.
Irithel can use Tigreal's engage window to deal sustained physical damage without starting the fight herself.

proof.summary: Tigreal creates a control window, while Irithel uses the created space to deal sustained physical damage.
worksBestWhen: Tigreal engages after Irithel is ready to follow.
Irithel keeps distance instead of walking into the engage.
failureCases: Enemies flank Irithel while Tigreal is forward.
Irithel lacks enough item timing for meaningful follow-up.

reasons: Minotaur can provide frontline control and sustain so Irithel survives longer in extended fights.
Irithel benefits when Minotaur keeps divers away and gives her time to keep attacking while moving.

proof.summary: Minotaur protects the fight space with control and sustain, while Irithel outputs damage from behind him.
worksBestWhen: Minotaur keeps engage threats away from Irithel.
Irithel follows from the backline instead of overextending.
failureCases: Minotaur is forced to engage away from Irithel.
Irithel is too far to use the created window.

reasons: Rafaela's healing and movement support help Irithel kite, chase, or retreat while maintaining attacks.
Irithel benefits from extra movement speed because her damage pattern depends on safe repositioning.

proof.summary: Rafaela adds movement and sustain, allowing Irithel to maintain spacing during extended fights.
worksBestWhen: Rafaela stays close enough to support Irithel's kiting path.
Irithel uses movement speed to keep spacing rather than overchase.
failureCases: Rafaela is picked off before the fight.
Enemy burst kills Irithel before healing matters.
Irithel is hard-controlled during the kite.

reasons: Angela can reinforce Irithel during enemy dives or extended fights.
Irithel can keep dealing damage longer when Angela adds shielding and sustain during the pressure window.

proof.summary: Angela adds a protection layer that helps Irithel survive while continuing to move and attack.
worksBestWhen: Angela saves protection for enemy dive timing.
Irithel remains within follow-up range of her team.
failureCases: Irithel is isolated before protection arrives.
The enemy applies layered crowd control.
